room.caption: [NightmareC2] If you didn't though: Claire used to also cast a shadow, if her shadow touched a trap's shadow, you took damage.

instance.creationCode: GID_SET(198541, self.id) ownerID=(198538) type=6 maxShadowDist=192 activated=0; timeLeft=15

stringToShow="One burning desire must nearly reach the heavens." signSize=1
stringToShow="Use the menu teleport function if it's too much for you." signSize=1
